Wonderful hike at The Presidio from the Golden Gate Welcome Center to Baker Beach It includes several former gun batteries overlooking the ocean and spectacular views of the Golden Gate Bridge, the Pacific coastline and the Marin Headlands. Two of the best viewpoints are the Golden Gate Overlook and the Pacific Overlook. If you want to include scenic and secluded Marshall's Beach, you will need to branch of the Coastal Trail and descend along the more rugged Batteries to Bluff Trail, but it is well worth it. You can do this as a one-way hike using public transportation as the #28 bus stops at the Welcome Center and the #29 bus stops near Baker Beach.
We had a lovely wander from Baker Beach to the Golden Gate Bridge and hardly saw another person. The views and the sound of the sea and the birds made it a very nice peaceful stroll.
